text: Trifle. Put this card on a vampire you control and move 2 or more blood from that vampire to your pool. Minion Tap cards cost an additional pool. Villein costs an additional pool to play on this vampire.

effects.text: Put this card on a vampire you control and move 2+ blood to your pool.
Minion Tap cards cost an additional pool on this vampire.
Villein costs an additional pool to play on this vampire.
